name: ch25-opener-specialist-robots
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A group of five friendly specialist robots, each clearly themed for a different domain. One wears a hard hat and holds a wrench (code agent), one has a magnifying glass and detective hat (research agent), one sits at a computer screen with a browser window (web agent), one has a stethoscope (domain expert), and one wears a lab coat with a clipboard (data analyst). They all stand together like a team photo, each looking proud of their specialty. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch25-code-agent-debug-loop
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot sitting at a desk with a computer, caught in a productive debugging cycle. In frame one, the robot writes code on the screen. In frame two, the screen shows a red error explosion. In frame three, the robot scratches its head and reads the error carefully. In frame four, the robot fixes the code and the screen glows green with success. The circular arrows between the frames show the self-debugging loop pattern. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch25-browser-agent-navigation
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A small friendly robot sitting inside a giant web browser window, using a tiny steering wheel to navigate. The browser shows a colorful webpage with buttons, forms, and links. The robot has a shopping list in one hand and is reaching toward a button with the other. Behind the browser, a trail of visited pages stretches into the background like stepping stones. The scene illustrates how browser agents interact with web interfaces to accomplish tasks. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch25-research-agent-detective
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot detective in a trench coat and magnifying glass standing in front of a giant corkboard. The corkboard has pinned documents, articles, and data charts connected by colored strings showing relationships. Some sources glow green (verified), some glow yellow (uncertain), and some are crossed out in red (unreliable). The robot is pinning a new finding to the board and connecting it with a string to existing evidence. A notepad nearby shows a research plan with checkmarks. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch25-swebench-obstacle-course
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A robot running an obstacle course where each obstacle represents a different software engineering challenge. The first obstacle is a wall of tangled spaghetti code to climb over. The second is a maze of file directories to navigate. The third is a broken bridge (failing test) that needs to be repaired to cross. The fourth is a finish line with a green checkmark flag. A scoreboard on the side shows the pass rate. Other robots at various stages of the course show different levels of success. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.

name: ch25-computer-use-desktop
prompt: Simple, cartoon-like educational illustration with clean lines and a warm color palette: A friendly robot sitting at a full computer desktop, with its robotic hands on the mouse and keyboard. The screen shows a typical desktop with multiple application windows open (spreadsheet, email, file manager). A thought bubble above the robot shows its plan: a sequence of click targets highlighted with crosshairs on the screen. The robot is carefully moving the mouse cursor toward one of these targets. The scene shows how computer use agents interact with the full desktop environment through vision and mouse or keyboard actions. The style should be friendly and approachable, like a comic strip or an XKCD-inspired infographic, with expressive characters and minimal visual clutter. Suitable for a technical textbook. No text or lettering in the image.
